items.claim: Cody Garbrandt maintains a very low striking volume late in his career.
items.quote: Cody Garbrandt's always been very low volume for the longest time, but especially like late into his career now. He throws absolutely nothing in there.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt fights defensively to avoid being knocked out rather than to win.
items.quote: It's one of those things where it looks like Cody's trying not to lose. He's fighting not to lose. He's fighting not to get knocked out, right?

items.claim: Adrien Yanez has finished via knockout in every one of his professional wins except for the Grant fight.
items.quote: he's knocked out every single one of his wins besides the the Grant win

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has been knocked out five or six times in his career.
items.quote: has been knocked out five or six times

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has a compromised chin.
Adrien Yanez is aggressive and effective at finishing opponents once he hurts them.
items.quote: what I like about Yan is is if he hurts you, he's going to swarm you. He's going to finish you.
